title: u-boot configuration
description: u-boot configuration documents configuration material for u-boot in the system domain. The page highlights Tips to add/remove boards, Etc, CONFIGSYSCPU=, CONFIGSYSSOC=, and If arch/$ARCH/mach-$SOC/include/mach exists,, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation.
